trigger: 30-minute MVP builder run: add an admin mentor-assignment provisioning endpoint that enforces role guards and writes audit events for both denied and successful assignment upserts.
scope: Implement `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` to upsert active mentor assignments while requiring admin access plus role validation (mentor must have `mentor`, student must have `student`); add integration coverage and update MVP evidence logs/manifests.
changes: Added `/api/admin/mentor-assignments` (admin-only) to create/reactivate mentor assignments while enforcing mentor/student role guards and writing audit events for denied and successful requests.
Added deterministic integration coverage for mentor assignment provisioning covering 401/403/404/409/200 behavior plus audit-event assertions.
Updated MVP requirement evidence and added this structured run manifest.
known_limits: Mentor assignment provisioning currently supports upsert/activation only; there is no admin endpoint yet for deactivation or listing assignments.
Schema-level constraints do not prevent direct SQL insertion of mentor assignments for non-mentor accounts; the new admin route enforces the role guard at write time.
next_actions: Add admin endpoints for listing and deactivating mentor assignments, including audit events for deactivation/reactivation.
Expand admin provisioning endpoints for teacher assignments and role changes with matching audit coverage.
